inputs.label: Daily Calorie Intake
inputs.businessContext: Typical total daily energy intake as basis for fat calculation

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical total daily energy intake as basis for fat calculation
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yağ hesaplaması için temel alınan tipik toplam günlük enerji alımı
businessContext_i18n.de: Typische tägliche Gesamtenergieaufnahme als Basis für die Fettberechnung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Apport énergétique total quotidien typique comme base pour le calcul des graisses
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingesta energética diaria total típica como base para el cálculo de grasa

inputs.label: Fat Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Target percentage of daily calories from fat, typically 20–35%

businessContext_i18n.en: Target percentage of daily calories from fat, typically 20–35%
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günlük kalorilerin yağdan gelmesi hedeflenen yüzdesi, tipik olarak %20–35
businessContext_i18n.de: Zielprozentsatz der täglichen Kalorien aus Fett, typischerweise 20–35 %
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage cible des calories quotidiennes provenant des graisses, généralement 20–35 %
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje objetivo de calorías diarias provenientes de grasa, típicamente 20–35%

inputs.label: Meals per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of daily meals for per-meal fat distribution

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of daily meals for per-meal fat distribution
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öğün başına yağ dağılımı için günlük öğün sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der täglichen Mahlzeiten für die Fettverteilung pro Mahlzeit
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de repas quotidiens pour la répartition des graisses par repas
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de comidas diarias para la distribución de grasa por comida

inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: Individual body weight used to normalize fat intake per kilogram

businessContext_i18n.en: Individual body weight used to normalize fat intake per kilogram
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vücut ağırlığını kilogram başına yağ alımını normalleştirmek için kullanılan bireysel ağırlık
businessContext_i18n.de: Individuelles Körpergewicht zur Normalisierung der Fettaufnahme pro Kilogramm
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel individuel utilisé pour normaliser l'apport en graisses par kilogramme
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso corporal individual utilizado para normalizar la ingesta de grasa por kilogramo

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
